_comment: Single source of truth for how the genealogy SKILLS run — the model AND the effort level. Read by the eval harness (eval/harness/harness/skill_runner.py -> DEFAULT_MODEL / DEFAULT_EFFORT) and the hosted web server (apps/server/app/config.py -> default_model / default_effort, injected into each sandbox as the MODEL / EFFORT env vars). Change these in ONE place. Override per-run without editing this file: --model / --effort (eval run_tests.py), or the DEFAULT_MODEL / DEFAULT_EFFORT env vars (server). skill_effort is one of low|medium|high|xhigh|max. Does NOT govern: the gps-mentor AGENT (its own `model:` frontmatter, honored by the Agent SDK) or Claude Cowork (runs skills on the user-selected session model; a SKILL.md `model:` field is inert there).
